‚úîÔ∏é Opened a new tab and set it active: tabs[0], page ‚Üí Search | LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/search/results/content/?keywords=claude%20code&sortBy=%22date_posted%22)
[system] this is redundant wait; openTab() already waits for the page to become usable. Falling back to 'stable' with 5s timeout.

It's all well and good, but what the videos don't show you is how expensive it is. These short animations can cost $50 or more to build.\n\nYou are also bound inside the Higgsfield ecosystem which puts a heavy markup on their image and video generation token costs. \n\n(The cynic in me wonders how many of these influencer videos have been commissioned by Higgsfield, who are going for a hefty $5B valuation in their latest fundraise.)\n\nSo I did some digging and realised that I could build my own video explainer pipeline using a combination of Fal and Remotion - for peanuts. \n\nBelow is just one early and rough example, where a doodle image generated using GPT Image-2 in Fal is then animated using Remotion. I'll be playing around with this a lot more and will share the completed explainer videos once they're ready to go. But that 'look', which can cost ¬£20 or more per month with Videoscribe, can be achieved for a few pence per image and then assembled programmatically using Remotion\n\nIt's worth looking at Fal dot ai as its costs are lower than Higgsfield and it only charges by consumption, not locking you into a monthly fee. And Remotion dot dev is a brilliant free tool that uses code to animate. \n\n‚Ä¶ more","author_name":"","author_href":"https://www.linkedin.com/in/darren-coxon/","container_head":"Feed post\n\nDarren Coxon\n\n \n ‚Ä¢ 2nd\n\nAI Leadership and Governance ‚ôæÔ∏è Agentic AI Development\n\n2m ‚Ä¢ \n\nFollow\n\nOne of the most appealing aspects of AI-driven development is how you can take an existing product or idea and think \"I wonder if I can improve it or do i","container_tail":"ooking at Fal dot ai as its costs are lower than Higgsfield and it only charges by consumption, not locking you into a monthly fee. speeds everything up\nTabnine ‚Üí privacy-friendly coding assistant\nAmazon Quick ‚Üí deep AWS-level support\nClaude ‚Üí clean code + strong reasoning\nChatGPT ‚Üí debugging, explaining, everything\nNow ‚Üí you guide, review, and refine\n\nSo the real skill isn‚Äôt just coding anymore.\n\nIt‚Äôs thinking better.\nPrompting better.\nDesigning better systems.\n\nBecause the best
